name: Shrimp & Cashew Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the shrimp; set aside.
2. Stir cashews in heated oil over a large frying pan until they release a nutty aroma and begin to brown. Remove with a slotted spoon and reserve.
3. Add onion and celery to the same oil; cook, stirring occasionally, over medium-high heat until onions are translucent (about 3 minutes). Add mushrooms and cook until they become brown. Mix in garlic and shrimp; stir until shrimp turn pink.
4. In a separate bowl, mix cornstarch smoothly with soy sauce and chicken stock. Stir into the shrimp mixture, adding spinach and peas for 30 seconds. Mix in the cornstarch mixture; stir just until thickened. Taste and add salt if needed. Sprinkle reserved cashews on top.
5. Serve shrimp over brown rice.
